hero.subtitle: We are transforming a vacant building in the historic centre of Pinhel into a multidisciplinary centre for training, social innovation, culture, gaming and digital creation.
hero.disclaimer: Public campaign with phased goals, a commitment to transparency and various forms of support.

video.title: See why this project needs to happen now
video.description: Global Village is not an abstract idea. It is a concrete response to breathe new life into a vacant building in Pinhel and create a space for training, culture, innovation and community.
video.tagline_value: From the interior to the future.
video.cta_support: I Want to Support This Project

about.title: What is Global Village?
about.description: Global Village – International Training Center aims to create, in Pinhel, an infrastructure capable of bringing together training, entrepreneurship, culture, creativity, technology and community participation in one place.
about.tagline: More than rehabilitating a space, we want to open new possibilities for the territory.

formacao.title: Training
formacao.description: Workshops, practical learning, residencies and skills development.

coworking.title: Coworking & Incubation
coworking.description: A space for ideas to grow, projects to be born and talent to stay in the region.

cultura.title: Culture & Arts
cultura.description: Social Gallery, cultural programming and promotion of artists and creators.

gaming.title: Gaming & Digital
gaming.description: Gaming Hub, digital content and technological skills for new career paths.

comunidade.title: Community & Internationalisation
comunidade.description: A space designed for young people, residents, partners and international participants.

reabilitacao.title: Urban Rehabilitation
reabilitacao.description: Bringing new life to a vacant building and reinforcing Pinhel's identity.

transparency.title: Every contribution helps unlock the next phase
transparency.description: The current campaign is focused on a first goal of €100,000, designed to help unlock licensing, property preparation, the start of the first phase of construction and working capital. The global project is presented with an estimated cost of €900,000.
transparency.cta_money: See how the money will be used →

rewards.description: From symbolic support to unique experiences and premium support. Every contribution brings Global Village closer to becoming a reality.

business.disclaimer: Tax benefits are not guaranteed. Donations without commercial consideration may fall under the Tax Benefits Statute. Contact us to evaluate your options.

faq.description_prefix: We have gathered here the answers to the most common questions about the campaign and the project

how_to_support.question: How can I support?
how_to_support.answer: You can contribute through our crowdfunding campaign, make a direct donation, support as a company or buy from our solidarity shop.

other_ways.question: Are there ways to donate outside the platform?
other_ways.answer: Yes. You can make a bank transfer, donate via MBWay or talk to us about business support and patronage.

rewards.question: How do the rewards work?
rewards.answer: Each support tier has an associated reward. You will receive all the details after your contribution.

goal_not_met.question: What happens if the goal is not reached?
goal_not_met.answer: Every euro raised will be applied to the project launch. The campaign is all-or-nothing; if we do not reach the goal, funds are returned.

transparency.question: How does transparency work?
transparency.answer: We publish regular updates, reports on the use of funds and project milestones. Follow everything in the Updates section.

companies.question: Are there options for companies?
companies.answer: Yes. We offer naming options, partnerships, patronage and visibility benefits. Contact us to find out more.

abroad.question: Can I support from abroad?
abroad.answer: Yes. The platform accepts international contributions and we provide a donation receipt.

receipt.question: How do I receive my receipt?
receipt.answer: You will receive it automatically by email after your contribution. For donations and business support, we issue a receipt for tax purposes.

cta.description: Every contribution helps transform vision into real space, community into movement and territory into opportunity.
